body_preview:
Shannon,

Talked to Keisha this morning. She says Jaylen has been running the neighborhood with Marcus every evening — says the boy is fast, which Marcus would absolutely take credit for. Anyway, dinner Sunday at 2 like always. Bring your appetite and that cornbread recipe you keep promising. Love you.

Mama
subject: Sunday dinner and the cornbread you owe me

body_preview:
Mama,

I'll be there at 2. Cornbread's coming, I promise — cast iron, the way Dad liked it. Tell Keisha if Jaylen wants to keep getting faster he needs to stop running on that cracked sidewalk on 1st Ave; that's how kids roll ankles. See you Sunday.

Love you,
Shannon
subject: Re: Sunday dinner and the cornbread you owe me

body_preview:
Keisha,

Marcus mentioned Jaylen's been talking about running track when he's older. Whenever you want, bring him by the clinic and I'll run some baseline movement screens — nothing serious, just so we know where he is athletically. No charge, he's my nephew. Let me know a Saturday that works.

Shannon
subject: Bring Jaylen by the clinic for a movement screen

body_preview:
Shan,

You literally read my mind. He's been nonstop about it since his friend made the JV team. Marcus is cautiously supportive, which I know you'll appreciate. How's Saturday the 17th — wait, that's Dad's anniversary, never mind. The 24th? Love you, thank you for looking out for him.

Keisha
subject: Re: Bring Jaylen by the clinic for a movement screen

body_preview:
Keisha,

The 24th I've got the cross country invitational at Oak Mountain all morning. Make it the 31st, 9 a.m., and I'll have the whole place to myself before the patient schedule starts. Tell him to wear shorts and running shoes, not basketball ones.

Shannon
subject: Re: Bring Jaylen by the clinic for a movement screen

body_preview:
Shannon,

Reminder that your annual physical and cardiac screening is set for November 15, 9 a.m. at UAB Sports Medicine. Given your training volume I want the echo done this year too. Bring the resting HR log from your watch if you've kept one. Don't run that morning.

Dr. Grant
subject: Annual physical + cardiac screening — Nov 15, 9 AM

body_preview:
Dr. Grant,

Confirmed for the 15th. I've got six weeks of resting HR and HRV off the watch — I'll export it the night before. No run that morning, understood. Quick question: should I hold caffeine too, or just the workout?

Shannon
subject: Re: Annual physical + cardiac screening — Nov 15, 9 AM

body_preview:
Coach Perry,

Wendell Pope, Auburn. Enjoyed watching Devon Mitchell at the Oak Mountain invitational — his closing speed in the 400 is real. We'd like to set up an unofficial visit before signing season heats up. Does the first Saturday in December work for you to drive him down?

Wendell
subject: Devon Mitchell — unofficial visit to Auburn?

body_preview:
Coach Pope,

December 5th works. I'll have Devon and we'll leave Birmingham early so we're there by mid-morning. His mom is on board; I'll loop her in on the details. He's a quiet kid but ask him about race splits and you won't get him to stop talking. Appreciate you tracking him.

Shannon Perry
Head Track Coach, Crestwood High
subject: Re: Devon Mitchell — unofficial visit to Auburn?

body_preview:
Coach,

Mr. Pope from Auburn called the house. I didn't know what to say so I told him to talk to you. Is this real? Is December the 5th still good for the visit? My mom wants to know if she should come or if it's just us.

Devon
subject: Auburn called my house

body_preview:
Devon,

It's real, and you earned it — that didn't happen by accident. December 5th is locked. I'm driving, we leave at 6 a.m. Your mom is welcome but it's not required; either way I'll have you back by dinner. Between now and then, no days off on the prehab. This is the start, not the finish.

Coach Perry
subject: Re: Auburn called my house

body_preview:
Shannon,

The clinic charity 5K is November 8 and I've got you down to run with the staff team. Brittany made shirts. Dr. Lawson is doing the opening remarks. Can you be at the clinic by 7:15 to help set up the timing tent? Proceeds go to the youth sports injury fund again this year.

Monica
subject: Iron City charity 5K — Nov 8 setup

body_preview:
Monica,

I'll be there at 7. Put me wherever you need a body for the timing tent. Tell Brittany if she made a 2XL I'll actually wear it this time instead of leaving it in the truck. Looking forward to it — last year raised what, eight grand for the fund?

Shannon
subject: Re: Iron City charity 5K — Nov 8 setup

body_preview:
Brother Perry,

Men's choir is back to first and third Sundays starting in January. We need you on the bass line — Watch Night especially, we're closing the year with 'Total Praise' and I want it strong. Practice 9 a.m. before service. Can I count on you?

Eddie Pruitt
Choir Director, New Hope AME
subject: Men's choir — Watch Night and January schedule

body_preview:
Brother Pruitt,

Count on me. I'll be at Watch Night and at the 9 a.m. practice on the first and third Sundays. 'Total Praise' is the right call to close out the year. I may be a few minutes late on January 18th — Saturday long run pushes into Sunday morning sometimes — but I'll be in my seat for service.

Shannon
subject: Re: Men's choir — Watch Night and January schedule

body_preview:
Shannon,

Your uncle here. Saw on the news the Mercedes-Benz Marathon route changed downtown this year. If you're still running that half in February, I'll be at the corner of 20th and Morris with a cowbell like always. Your dad would've loved watching you do this. Proud of you, nephew.

Uncle Ray
subject: Marathon route changed — I'll be at the corner

body_preview:
Uncle Ray,

Still running it — the half, February 6th. 20th and Morris is right around mile 9, that's exactly where I'll need the cowbell. Means a lot. I think about Dad every time I lace up before a race. Tell Aunt Pearl I said hello. Love you.

Shannon
subject: Re: Marathon route changed — I'll be at the corner

body_preview:
Coach Perry,

Tasha Reid, Alabama. Following up on Devon Mitchell and Trey Dawson after the season opener at CrossPlex. I'd like to get a video call on the calendar with you, the athletes, and their parents — late January if you can. Both of those young men are on our board. Let me know what evening works.

Tasha
subject: Devon Mitchell & Trey Dawson — recruiter call

body_preview:
Coach Reid,

Thursday January 22nd at 6 p.m. Central works. I'll have Devon and Trey on, and I'll get Yolanda Dawson on the line as well — Trey's mom. One ground rule: these are teenagers, so I'll be on the call the whole time. Send the video link and I'll forward it to everyone. Appreciate the interest.

Shannon Perry
Head Track Coach, Crestwood High
subject: Re: Devon Mitchell & Trey Dawson — recruiter call

body_preview:
Coach Perry,

It's Yolanda, Trey's mom. Thank you for handling the Alabama call and keeping us parents in the loop — I don't know how this recruiting stuff works and you make it feel manageable. Trey won't say it but he looks up to you. Whatever I can do for the booster club this season, just ask.

Yolanda Dawson
subject: Thank you for the Alabama call

body_preview:
Shannon,

Thanksgiving at my house, 2 p.m. on the 26th. Keisha's bringing the mac, Marcus is frying the turkey out back so keep the fire extinguisher handy. Raymond's coming too. Bring your appetite and that boy Devon if his family's not doing anything — nobody should eat Thanksgiving alone. Love you.

Mama
subject: Thanksgiving at my house — 2 PM the 26th

body_preview:
Mama,

We'll be there at 2. I'll ask Devon — his mom works holidays at the hospital sometimes so he might take you up on it. Tell Marcus the turkey hits 165 internal and not a degree more; I'm not treating a burn on Thanksgiving. I'll bring the greens. Love you.

Shannon
subject: Re: Thanksgiving at my house — 2 PM the 26th

body_preview:
Shannon,

Quick one from the clinic side. New patient Roderick James booked a PT eval for January 26, 7:15 a.m. — post-op ACL, referred by Dr. Lawson. Chart's in the system. He mentioned he runs, so you two will get along. Reminder also: please sign off on Trey Dawson's athlete-consent form before the season opener.

Monica
subject: New patient eval Jan 26 + Trey's consent form

body_preview:
Coach Perry,

Demetrius here. Season opener logistics for Feb 13 at the CrossPlex — I've got the heat sheets and the bus leaves Crestwood at 7. Reggie Means from Mountain Brook confirmed they're bringing their sprint relay so it'll be a real measuring stick. Want me to run warmups so you can scout? Let me know.

Demetrius
subject: Season opener logistics — Feb 13 CrossPlex
